title: Section 26325
text: This chapter addresses a matter of statewide concern and not a municipal affair, as that term is used in Section 5 of Article XI of the California Constitution. (Added by Stats. 2022, Ch. 395, Sec. 2. (SB 1186) Effective January 1, 2023.) BPC Business and Professions Code - BPC

structure.chapter_title: Medicinal Cannabis Patients’ Right of Access Act
